title: Proclamation No. 409, s. 2000
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 409

CREATING AND DESIGNATING A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN BARANGAY MANGHINAO I, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, AS A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995, as amended by Republic Act No. 8748, and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA, President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate as a special economic zone, subject to the provisions of the Republic Act No. 7916, as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, and Resolution No. 96-287 dated 29 August 1996 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, a certain parcel of land located in Barangay Manghinao I, Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas, to be known as First Batangas Industrial Park (FBIP) consisting of FIVE HUNDRED THIRTY EIGHT THOUSAND ONE HUNDRED THIRTY EIGHT (538,138) SQUARE METERS , more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

PARCEL I

SK-04-001385

A parcel of land (Parcel 1 comprising of Lots 5710, 5781, 5775, 5786, 5776, 5780, 5785, 5777, 5778, 5779, 5782, 5783, 5784, 5707, 5933, 5932, 5708, 5931, 5930, 5709, 5711, 5713, 5714, 5715, 5717, 5712, 5705, 5706, 5704, 5487, 5486, 5485, 5484, 5483, 5482, 5479, 5478, 5477, 5476, 5475, 5474, 5473, 5472, 5471, 5469, 5470, 5466, 5534, 5535, 5333, 5481, 5465, 5488, 5541, 5463, 5520, 5564, 5540, 5462, 5461, 5467, 5468, 5469, 5716, all of Cad-584, Bauan Cadastre, as shown on plan SK-04-001385, L.R.C. Rec. No. ___), situated in the Brgy. of Manghinao I, Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas. Bounded on the SE., and NE., along lines 1 to 20 by Dry Creek (5.00 to 30.00 m. wide), on the S., along lines 20-23, by lot 5774, on the SE., and SW., along lines 23-26 by lot 5787 both of Bauan Cadastre; on the W., NW., and SW., along lines 26-57 by Quipot River; on the NW., along lines 57-59 by lot 5458 along lines 59-60 by lot 5459, along lines 60-61 by lot 50-25, along lines 61-63 by lot 5460, all of Bauan Cadastre; on the NE., along lines 63-67-1 by Creek (20.00 to 25.00 m. wide).

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being, N. 42 deg. 40′ W., 2193.80 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 1, Cad-584 Bauan Cadastre.

beginning, containing an area of FOUR HUNDRED NINETY EIGHT THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED NINETY ONE (498,391) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cm; bearing true, date of original survey, date prepared: September 21, 1977; Date approved: October 2, 1997.

PARCEL II

SK-04-001385

A parcel of land (Parcel II comprising of lots 5720, 5719, 5718, 5722-A all of Cad-584 Bauan Cadastre, as shown on plan SK-04-001385, L.R.C. Record No. ___), situated in Brgy. of Manghinao I, Municipality of Bauan, Province of Batangas. Bounded on the NE, along line 1-2 by lot 5722-B; on the SE., along line 2-3 by lot 5768, along line 3-4 by lot 5769, along line 4-5 by lot 5771, along line 5-6 by lot 5772, all of Bauan Cadastre; on the NW., S., SW., along lines 6-7-8-9-10-11-12 by Creek (20.00 to 25.00 m. wide), on the NW., along line 12-13 by lot 5721; on the NE., & NW., along line 13-14-15 by lot 5538, both of Bauan Cadastre; on the NE., along line 15-16 by National Road; on the SE., NE., along lines 16-17-1 by lot 5722-B, Bauan Cadastre.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being, N. 41 deg. 45′ W., 1879.08 m. from B.L.L.M. No. 1, Cad-584 Bauan Cadastre:

beginning, containing an area of THIRTY NINE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED FORTY SEVEN (39,747) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by P.S. Cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cm; bearings true, date of original survey, date prepared: September 21, 1997; date approved: October 2, 1997.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 4 th day of November, in the year of Our Lord, two thousand.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA

By the President: (Sgd.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
